Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}Woohoo! School's out! And boy, do I have a hankering for sushi tonight![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Just wait for me, my precious, beloved sushi. I'll be sure to come home hungry![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sooo I'm gonna take the long way home to work up an appetite. You go on ahead without me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Ugh... God, I want a hamburger so bad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}No! I gotta resist! My scrumptious sushi is waiting for me tonight![n]{f 1 1}
